{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Damascan camp
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Damascan camp]] is located slightly south of their city.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Damascan camp]] was the only group that knew [[Indirial]] was missing.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
